title: FMD - Both earbuds disconnected
scenario: Find My Device feature in Lens app shows both earbuds and case as disconnected on Voyager Free 60 Series
steps: Open the Poly Lens app on the mobile device.
Navigate to the Find My Device feature from the Home screen.
Observe the device list displayed on the Find My Device screen.
Note the entries shown: Case, Left earbud, and Right earbud.
Check the connection status indicator for each entry.
expected: The Find My Device feature should show the Case, Left earbud, and Right earbud as connected when the earbuds are in use and within range. At minimum, the connected earbud(s) should show as connected.
